name: NANO Nuclear Energy Inc.
content: NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. is an advanced technology-driven nuclear energy company focused on developing portable, clean energy solutions. The company is primarily engaged in the design and development of micro-reactors, including its proprietary 'ZEUS' solid-core battery reactor and 'ODIN' low-pressure coolant reactor. Beyond reactor design, NANO Nuclear is building a comprehensive nuclear ecosystem, including fuel fabrication, transportation of nuclear materials, and consulting services. Its mission is to provide small-scale, carbon-free power for remote locations, industrial applications, and disaster relief, positioning itself as a leader in the next generation of nuclear technology.
